name: qr-code-styling
when_to_use: 需要把 URL/文本做成带圆点、品牌色、渐变或 logo 且仍可扫码的 QR 交付物时用它而非手拼 SVG，因为原生在纠错编码、finder pattern、logo 遮挡与模块留白上失败；非做扫码识别器。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画“像二维码”的随机方格，做不到 QR 版本选择、纠错码、掩模、定位图形与 logo 背景点隐藏，输出不可验证扫描；该库把标准编码和品牌样式放在同一配置里。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of assembling SVG by hand when you need to turn a URL or text into a scannable branded QR deliverable with dots, brand colors, gradients, or a logo, because native implementations fail at error-correction encoding, finder patterns, logo occlusion, and module quiet zones; not for a QR scanner.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally only draw random squares that look like a QR code; it cannot implement QR version selection, error-correction codes, masks, finder patterns, and hiding background modules behind a logo, so the output is not verifiably scannable. This library combines standard encoding and brand styling in one configuration.

data_in.note: options is passed directly to new QRCodeStyling; boot only normalizes the default output to 256x256 SVG, and unlisted function extensions do not enter the pure-data schema.

options.data: string -- text to encode; an empty string is an empty state and draws no code
options.height?: positive integer CSS pixels -- defaults to spec.height (initially 256)
options.image?: string URL or data URI -- omitted by default; no logo

dotsOptions?.gradient?: {type:'linear'|'radial',rotation?:number,colorStops:{offset:number 0..1,color:string}[]} -- omitted by default; rotation defaults to 0

options.cornersSquareOptions?: {type?:'dot'|'square'|'extra-rounded'|DotType,color?:string,gradient?:Gradient} -- omitted by default, using black square finder frames
options.cornersDotOptions?: {type?:'dot'|'square'|DotType,color?:string,gradient?:Gradient} -- omitted by default, using black square finder dots

spec.note: An SVG/canvas QR code must have explicit pixel dimensions; boot defaults to 256px high and lets options.height override spec.height. Do not use vh or percentage heights; width defaults to options.width at 256px.

data_in.note: options 直接传给 new QRCodeStyling；boot 仅把默认输出校准为 256×256 SVG，未列函数扩展不进入纯数据 schema。

options.data: string —— 待编码文本；空字符串为空态，不绘制码
options.width?: positive integer CSS pixels —— 默认 256
options.height?: positive integer CSS pixels —— 默认取 spec.height（初始 256）
options.margin?: non-negative number CSS pixels —— 默认 0
options.image?: string URL 或 data URI —— 默认省略，不放 logo

imageOptions?.margin?: non-negative number CSS pixels —— 默认 0

options.cornersSquareOptions?: {type?:'dot'|'square'|'extra-rounded'|DotType,color?:string,gradient?:Gradient} —— 默认省略，沿用黑色方形定位框
options.cornersDotOptions?: {type?:'dot'|'square'|DotType,color?:string,gradient?:Gradient} —— 默认省略，沿用黑色方形定位点

spec.note: SVG/canvas 二维码必须有明确像素尺寸；boot 默认 256px 高并让 options.height 覆盖 spec.height，禁止 vh/百分比高，宽度由 options.width 默认 256px。

example._why: 样式 config 深且 dots/corners/background/qrOptions 容易错层，minimal 保留一个可扫描的品牌化 SVG。

uplink: 纯生成/显示组件，默认无需上行；下载由消费 AI 直接调用 qr.download({name,extension}) 或 getRawData(extension)，不封装统一事件。

carriers.widget: conditional:无 logo 时纯 SVG/canvas 且完全落 shadowRoot；远程 image 需宿主放行图片域与 CORS，建议 data URI
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG/canvas；远程 logo 仍受图片 CORS，默认无 logo

isolation.evidence: STYLE=no:+esm 实测无 document.head、无 addEventListener。EVENTS=no:实测无 addEventListener。DOM=no:渲染由 qr.append(host) 落入传入容器;唯一 document.body 用法是下载辅助(实测 document.body.appendChild(e),e.click();...removeChild(e)),仅在 qr.download() 触发、瞬时自清,不在 boot 渲染路径。shadowCompatible=yes:SVG/canvas 完全落 shadow 容器;唯一条件是远程 logo image 需宿主 img-src/CORS(建议 data URI)。
